overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from a third-person perspective following a red car driving through an urban city street with tram tracks, eventually stopping behind another vehicle. The scene features artificial street lighting, mixed commercial and residential buildings, and light traffic.

agents.ego_description: driving the red car through the city street at night, passing a police car on the left side

notable_agents.action: police car parked on the left side of the street near the intersection

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement billboard on the left side of the road
multi-story residential building with balconies on the right side
metal tram tracks embedded in the center of the asphalt road
tall street lamp illuminating the intersection
building with large painted mural on the facade

segments.scene_description: Driving through an urban intersection at night with tram tracks running down the center of the road. A police car is visible on the left side while apartment buildings and a commercial building with a mural line the right side. The area is illuminated by streetlights and a large billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and parked vehicles

events.description: vehicle slows down and comes to a stop behind traffic ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the commercial street, slowing to a stop behind another vehicle

entered.detail: brick commercial building with blue storefront awning and illuminated interior
street tree with dense foliage on the right sidewalk
circular metal manhole cover on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: Driving past commercial buildings with illuminated storefronts, including a brick building with a blue awning. The vehicle slows down as it approaches a stop, with a black van parked on the right and a manhole cover visible on the road. The tram tracks continue down the center of the street.

events.description: vehicle comes to a complete stop behind the red car ahead
pedestrian enters the frame walking along the right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: stopped behind another vehicle at a traffic stop, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: walking along the sidewalk on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Stopped at a traffic light or intersection behind another vehicle. A pedestrian walks along the sidewalk to the right, passing by the parked black van and commercial buildings. The tram tracks and manhole cover remain visible in the road ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a nighttime urban corridor that transitions from a wide, brightly lit intersection to a sudden halt in a commercial district. It begins by moving through a city crossing with tram tracks centered in the road, passing a police car on the left and a mural-covered building under the glow of a large billboard. As the camera advances, the scene shifts toward a row of illuminated storefronts and a brick building with a blue awning, while the vehicle begins to decelerate. The movement then slows further past a parked black van and a manhole cover before finally coming to a complete stop behind another vehicle. The shot concludes at the intersection as a pedestrian walks along the sidewalk past the commercial buildings and the stationary traffic.
